arts.ttl: Bayern boss warns against dream of UCL final in Munich becoming a “burden” for players
arts.sum: After 13 years, it is happening again: Bayern Munich ’s home stadium, the Allianz Arena, is set to host the Champions League final once again. To fully avenge the wrongs of the past by winning the Champions League in front of all their fans in the Allianz Arena.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany looking forward to the break
arts.sum: One thing Vincent Kompany will be able to enjoy since his move from the English Premier League to Bayern Munich and the Bundesliga? Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Frans Krätzig seems set to be replaced at VfB Stuttgart
arts.sum: Frans Krätzig started 2024 with a brilliant loan to Austria Vienna, which saw the Bayern Munich establish himself as an indispensable member of a team in the Austrian Bundesliga and ended it forgotten at VfB Stuttgart, lost in the league of his home country. Frans Krätzig’s loan to Stuttgart started promisingly and may end prematurely and disappointingly in the winter.

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Konrad Laimer returns to training; Serge Gnabry makes progress; Manuel Neuer is running; and MORE!
arts.sum: Konrad Laimer trained normally with the team today after he cut yesterday's session short [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/8Vbqby2J6T While he is not ready for action yet, Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer did work out on the treadmill:

arts.ttl: Arsenal top Champions League group with dramatic comeback win over Bayern Munich - as Mariona Caldentey keeps cool to convert crucial last-minute penalty
arts.sum: TARA ANSON-WALSH AT MEADOW PARK: The Gunners went into this game knowing that anything less than a win would prevent them from finishing top.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. RB Leipzig - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Friday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and RB Leipzig, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Arsenal top Champions League group after late win over Bayern
arts.sum: Mariona Caldentey scored a late penalty to send Arsenal through to the Women's Champions League quarter-finals as Group C winners with a 3-2 victory over Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany knows Bayern Munich will step up the day Thomas Müller retires
arts.sum: The Bavarians have largely replaced Müller already on the field — with Jamal Musiala handling the lion’s share of the work in attacking midfield. Bayern Munich star Thomas Müller looks like he is nearing the end of a stellar career.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs. RB Leipzig (Bundesliga)
arts.sum: A look at the rosters and injuries for RB Leipzig and Bayern Munich . Bayern Munich will host RB Leipzig for a Bundesliga showdown that became really important after the Bavarians were knocked off by Mainz 05 last weekend.

arts.ttl: Not for sale: Bayern Munich not looking to unload Kingsley Coman in January
arts.sum: Kingsley Coman will see out the season with Bayern Munich... Bayern have decided that Kingsley Coman is not for sale in January.
